baseline.lint: passed with existing boundaries legacy selector warning

findings.title: Multi-selection flip and keyboard nudge transform only the primary object
findings.trigger: Select multiple objects, then press H, V, an arrow key, or use Arrange flip commands.
findings.expected: All selected objects transform as one selection. Flip mirrors across the combined selection area, matching LightBurn's selection workflow.
findings.actual: Only selectedObjectId is transformed; additionalSelectedIds are ignored.
findings.consequence: A grouped layout can be moved or mirrored incorrectly before burning.
findings.fix: Add batch nudgeSelection and flipSelection actions, flip around the combined selection bbox center, and wire menu and shortcuts through the same batch action.
verification: Unit test multi-select H/V mirrors both objects around combined bbox center.
Unit test ArrowRight moves all selected objects with one undo entry.
Browser smoke validates group nudge and flip.
findings.fixedBy: batch nudge/flip selection actions plus shortcut/menu wiring
verifiedBy: corepack pnpm vitest run src/ui/state/selection-transform-actions.test.ts src/ui/state/store.test.ts src/ui/app/shortcuts.test.ts src/ui/commands/previewable-content.test.ts src/ui/app/shortcuts-docs.test.ts

findings.title: Multi-delete creates one undo entry per object
findings.trigger: Select multiple objects, delete them, then press Undo once.
findings.expected: One Delete user action should be one undoable action that restores the whole selection.
findings.actual: Delete loops over ids and each removeSceneObject call pushes its own undo snapshot.
findings.consequence: Undo restores deleted objects one at a time, leaving partial scene state after one Undo.
findings.fix: Add removeSceneObjects(ids) that removes all selected objects and prunes empty layers in one mutation with one undo snapshot.
verification: Unit test multi-delete increments undo stack once.
Unit test one Undo restores all deleted objects and auto-removed layer rows.
findings.fixedBy: removeSceneObjects batch delete action with one undo snapshot
verifiedBy: corepack pnpm vitest run src/ui/state/selection-transform-actions.test.ts src/ui/state/store.test.ts src/ui/app/shortcuts.test.ts src/ui/commands/previewable-content.test.ts src/ui/app/shortcuts-docs.test.ts

findings.title: Preview can be enabled even when no object will output
findings.trigger: Have any output-enabled layer and any scene object, but no object assigned to an output-enabled compatible layer.
findings.expected: Preview affordance should require actual output geometry because Preview represents what will be sent to the laser.
findings.actual: hasPreviewableContent checks any output layer plus any object, without resolving object-to-output-layer participation.
findings.consequence: The app can offer a pre-burn preview for a non-output job, undermining WYSIWYG confidence.
findings.fix: Introduce a shared hasOutputGeometry/previewableObjectCount helper and use it for Preview enablement and tooltips.
verification: Unit test empty output layer plus object on output-off layer keeps Preview disabled.
Unit tests vector and raster output-enabled objects enable Preview.
findings.fixedBy: shared hasPreviewableContent predicate resolves real object-to-output-layer participation
verifiedBy: corepack pnpm vitest run src/ui/state/selection-transform-actions.test.ts src/ui/state/store.test.ts src/ui/app/shortcuts.test.ts src/ui/commands/previewable-content.test.ts src/ui/app/shortcuts-docs.test.ts

findings.title: WORKFLOW.md still documents the old Ctrl/Cmd+E export shortcut
findings.trigger: A user or future agent follows WORKFLOW.md and presses Ctrl/Cmd+E expecting Save G-code.
findings.expected: Docs should match the implemented LightBurn-parity shortcut: Ctrl/Cmd+E is Ellipse and Ctrl/Cmd+Shift+E exports G-code.
findings.actual: WORKFLOW.md still says Ctrl/Cmd+E saves G-code.
findings.consequence: Docs-as-spec drift can cause users and future agents to use or reintroduce the wrong shortcut.
findings.fix: Update WORKFLOW.md F-A9 and F-A15 to Ctrl/Cmd+Shift+E for Save G-code and document Ctrl/Cmd+E as Ellipse.
findings.fixedBy: WORKFLOW.md shortcut docs updated and guarded by shortcuts-docs test
verifiedBy: corepack pnpm vitest run src/ui/state/selection-transform-actions.test.ts src/ui/state/store.test.ts src/ui/app/shortcuts.test.ts src/ui/commands/previewable-content.test.ts src/ui/app/shortcuts-docs.test.ts

rejectedOrDeferred.reason: Existing tests cover layer creation for drawn shapes; no current trigger path promoted.
Current WIP uses batch selection actions for these commands, so they are not part of LF-BH-001.
Later preflight may block the job. The promoted finding is limited to Preview enablement.
